WITN11730200
WITN11730200

Witness Name: Carl Creswell
Statement No.: WITN11730200
Dated: 22 October 2024

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

SECOND WITNESS STATEMENT OF CARL CRESWELL

I, Carl Creswell, will say as follows.

INTRODUCTION

1. I am Director, Post Office Policy and Business Engagement, in the Department for Business and Trade. In this statement I refer to that Department and its predecessors as "the Department". I have prepared this 'corporate' statement on behalf of the Department in response to the Inquiry's request for evidence dated 25 September 2024 ("the Rule 9 request"), in order to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry in relation to the Department's role in providing redress for those affected by the Horizon scandal.

2. I have prepared this statement with extensive support of Departmental officials, the Government Legal Department and counsel. The contents of this statement are true to the best of my knowledge and belief. I am authorised by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade to make it.

Page 1 of 25
